name: Query Machines + Metrics + Loss
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
    machine_name AS Mesin,
    availability AS Availability,
    performance AS Performance,
    quality AS Quality,
    oee AS OEE,
    status AS Status
FROM machine
ORDER BY machine_name;
`;
return msg;
